Bajaj Finserv Ltd

Bajaj Finserv Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

Bajaj Finserv Ltd

₹ 1,896 2.15%
03 Jul - close price
bajajfinserv.in BSE: 532978 NSE: BAJAJFINSV
About

Bajaj Finserv Ltd. is the holding company for the various financial services businesses under the Bajaj group. It serves millions of customers by providing solutions for asset acquisition through financing, asset protection through general insurance, family and income protection in the form of life and health insurance, and retirement and savings solutions.[1]

Key Points

Revenue Split
Life Insurance: 25% in FY22 vs 55% in FY18
General Insurance: 28% in FY22 vs 0% in FY18
Retail Financing: 45% in FY22 vs 43% in FY18
Investment:1% in FY22 vs 2% in FY18. [1] [2] [3]

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 3,03,400 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 1,896
  • High / Low ₹ 2,195 / 1,597
  • Stock P/E 30.5
  • Book Value ₹ 487
  • Dividend Yield 0.08 %
  • ROCE 10.5 %
  • ROE 13.2 %
  • Face Value ₹ 1.00
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Company's median sales growth is 20.6% of last 10 years

Cons

  • Stock is trading at 3.89 times its book value
  • Company has low interest coverage ratio.
  • Company has a low return on equity of 13.8% over last 3 years.

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

Classifications such as banks and foreign portfolio investors were not available earlier. The sudden changes in FII or DII can be because of these changes.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Closure of Trading Window 29 Jun
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Newspaper Publication
    23 Jun - Please find enclose herewith copy of newspaper advertisement published on 23 June 2026 relating to 19th E-AGM.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Analyst / Investor Meet - Intimation
    16 Jun - Bajaj Finserv will meet institutional investors on 23-24 June 2026 in London at IIFL Invest India Conference.
  • Communication Sent To Shareholders Regarding Tax Deduction At Source (TDS) On Final Dividend And Updation Of Bank Account Details
    10 Jun - 10 June 2026 shareholder notice on TDS for final dividend and bank account updates.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Directorate
    9 Jun - Rajiv Bajaj will step down from Bajaj Finserv board at 31 July 2026 AGM.
